subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned unto God! Hearts have been made joyous, sorrows have been dispelled, and both inner vision and outward sight have been gladdened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی الله قد فرح القلوب و انکشف الکروب و قرت البصائر و الابصار و
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
